summary: Migrated parallelism dispatching from CLI-based 'gemini-gateway' binary invocation to MCP tool-based invocation. The gateway now exposes MCP tools (gateway_dispatch, gateway_batch_dispatch, gateway_status) instead of being called via run_command with bash pipes. Model tiers were simplified from 5 levels (lite/quick/fast/think/deep) to 2 (fast/deep). This change affected all rule files, plugin configs, and workflow files that reference parallelism. The change also added a new step to '/init' to check project memory MCP availability.
